title: Dashboard Overview
description: Implement the dashboard API endpoint and landing page component showing meeting stats, recent meetings, and upcoming action items.
designContext: Dashboard API aggregates data from meetings.json and action-items.json. Returns totalMeetings, totalActionItems, overdueItems count, recentMeetings (last 5), and upcomingActionItems (open/in-progress items sorted by due date). Frontend dashboard-view component renders hero section with stats, recent meetings cards, and action items list.
